title: How to combine cells with a line break between them
task: Join text from several cells into one cell with each piece on its own line (e.g. an address block).
keywords: combine cells new line google sheets

excel.note: CHAR(10) is a line feed. Turn on Wrap Text to see the breaks.

explanation: CHAR(10) inserts a newline character; & glues the pieces together. The break only shows visually when the cell has Wrap Text enabled, otherwise it looks like one line.
